name: Tomato Aspic Salad
recipeIngredient: Green pepper strips (red, yellow with green)
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure cold water into a small saucepan.
2. Sprinkle gelatin on top of the water.
3. Stir over low heat for 3-4 minutes, or until the gelatin is completely dissolved except for the lettuce and green peppers.
4. Mix well and chill until firm.
5. Unmold onto crisp lettuce and garnish with green peppers (red and yellow also work well for summer).
6. Food Exchange per serving: 1 VEGETABLE EXCHANGE; CAL: 25; CHO: 4g; PRO: 2g; FAT: 0g; SOD: 332mg
